spend_model_flags.ms_standardized_notes: Confirmed Microsoft Enterprise Agreement (EA) holder. Azure is primary cloud platform. Softchoice/WWT licensing opportunity confirmed. Bengaluru ENGINE center also on Azure infrastructure.

signals.signal_title: Chevron partners with Engine No. 1 and GE Vernova to develop 4GW dedicated power for AI data centers
signals.signal_description: Chevron plans to develop 4 gigawatts of dedicated power for data centers via its partnership with Engine No. 1 and GE Vernova, positioning itself as a major energy provider for the AI infrastructure buildout.

signals.signal_title: Chevron Microsoft Azure partnership for predictive maintenance and supply chain cloud transformation
signals.signal_description: Chevron partnered with Microsoft Azure to connect thousands of pieces of high-value equipment with sensors for predictive maintenance. Also partnered with Publicis Sapient to migrate supply chain data to Azure for advanced analytics and AI.

signals.signal_title: Chevron hires Les Copeland as CIO from General Motors
signals.signal_description: Chevron appointed Les Copeland as Chief Information Officer in April 2024. Copeland previously served as CIO for Global Manufacturing and Global Supply Chain at General Motors, bringing digital transformation expertise from automotive sector.

signals.signal_title: Chevron names Ryder Booth VP Technology Projects and Execution
signals.signal_description: Chevron named Ryder Booth as Vice President of Technology, Projects and Execution effective July 2025 as part of organizational restructuring to simplify structure and execute faster.
